title: Slide Publisher — Template Profile
description: Per-user adapter between the generic Deck IR and the user's brand-consistent output. Produced by the template-setup wizard at install. Consumed by renderers on every render.

profile_version.description: Semver of the template-profile schema this document targets. v0.1 plugins emit '1.0.0'.

preferred_output.description: Default render target. Other renderers remain available per-compile.

templates.description: Per-format template references + layout maps + quality scores. At least one format must be present.

voice_constraints.description: Optional pointer to a user-supplied voice/style spec. The plugin ships no defaults; users wire their own.

setup_completed.description: ISO 8601 date the install wizard completed.

setup_version.description: Semver of the plugin version that ran the install wizard.

layout_map.description: Maps each IR layout_intent to the template's concrete layout. Every layout_intent in v0.1 should be mapped; unmapped intents fall back to the documented 'nearest available' rule with an explicit loss-manifest entry.

quality_score.description: 0-100 score from template-validator. Findings live in the sidecar quality report.

path.description: Local filesystem path to the user's .pptx template.

file_key.description: Figma file key for the user's template.

layout_map.description: Maps IR layout_intent to Figma node ID of the slide template.

template_map_json.description: Path to the cached sidecar produced by the Figma publish chain (per-file-key cache of node IDs and resolved styles).

template_gslides.description: v0.2 surface. Schema-supported in v0.1 for forward compatibility; the v0.1 plugin will not write or read this branch.

file_id.description: Google Slides file ID for the user's template.

style_tokens.description: Extracted token system from the user's template. Optional; populated by extractors when possible.

colors.description: Named color tokens. Values are hex strings.

typography.description: Named type tokens. Each token names a font family, size, weight, and optional line-height.

spacing.description: Named spacing tokens. Values are point sizes.
